title: Insurance producers; standards; sale of annuities; rulemaking
doc_html:
§919. Insurance producers; standards; sale of annuities; rulemaking

            The commissioner shall promulgate and adopt rules, in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act, to govern the standards which insurance producers shall follow in the sale of annuity products.

            Acts 2023, No. 73, §1.
doc_text:
§919.  Insurance producers; standards; sale of annuities; rulemaking
The commissioner shall promulgate and adopt rules, in accordance with the
Administrative Procedure Act, to govern the standards which insurance producers shall
follow in the sale of annuity products.
Acts 2023, No. 73, §1.
